description_long: This ornate jewelry piece features a prominent oval-shaped red gemstone set in a decorative metal frame, suspended from an intricate floral-inspired arrangement of smaller, clear stones and metalwork. The upper section is adorned with multiple petal-like and leaf-shaped elements, giving the piece a delicate, botanical appearance. The metal appears to be a dark, possibly oxidized or blackened silver, providing a striking contrast to the vibrant central gemstone. The gemstone is faceted, enhancing its brilliance and depth, and is securely held by prongs integrated into the frame. The back of the piece is solid and less detailed, with the gemstone still visible but less vibrant. The overall design suggests a brooch or pendant, intended to be worn as a statement accessory.
description: An ornate brooch or pendant with a large red gemstone set in dark metal, featuring intricate floral motifs and clear accent stones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed floral metalwork and the prominent red gemstone centerpiece.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the gemstone setting and the layered construction of the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid metal backing and the less vibrant appearance of the gemstone.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the profile of the gemstone and the three-dimensional structure of the floral motif.
